# Digital Trust & Safety: Combatting the Evolving Complexities of Payment Fraud

# Digital Trust & Safety: Combatting the Evolving Complexities of Payment Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Consumer payment options have expanded rapidly over the past decade, with methods like cryptocurrency and in-app purchasing making shopping faster and easier—and opening new doors for tech-savvy fraudsters on the hunt for profits.

Download this report, created by Merchant Fraud Journal and Sift, to learn:

*   Why and when trust plays the most critical role when consumers make buying decisions
*   How the world’s leading brands consider the risks and reap the rewards of a changing payments landscape
*   Blind spots many companies miss, from small business growing pains to enterprise expansion

### Download the Ebook

Get the Ebook

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
